---
title: "Skills"
---

<script type="text/javascript">
 function showhide(id) {
    var e = document.getElementById(id);
    e.style.display = (e.style.display == 'block') ? 'none' : 'block';
 }
</script>

<style>
a {color: blue;}
p {color: black;}
.tooltipRtext {color: white;}
ul {text-align: left; color: black;}
</style>

## Computer Engineering

### Embedded Systems

#### Programming
  
* C/C++ 
* Python
* Assembly
* Machine code
* Register-level C 
* Simulink
  
#### Development Environments
  
* Code Composer Studio
* SoftConsole
* MATLAB
* Energia
* Arduino
  
#### Embedded Operating Systems

<ul>

<li>ROS (Robot Operating System)</li>
<li>VxWorks</li>
<li>FreeRTOS</li>
<li>Windows IOT</li>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('linux')"><li style="color:gray;">Linux</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext"><ul style="color:white;">
<li>Real-Time</li>
<li>Embedded</li>
<li>Raspberry OS</li>
</ul></span></span></div>
</ul>
  
#### Microcontrollers

<ul>

<li>Intel Galileo</li>
<li>Raspberry Pi</li>
<li>LattePanda</li>
<li>ESP 8266</li>
<li>MSP 432</li>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('arduino')"><li style="color:gray;">Arduino</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext"><ul style="color:white;">
<li>Uno</li>
<li>Nano</li>
<li>Mega</li>
</ul></span></span></div>
</ul>
    
### Digital Systems

#### FPGAs and HDLs

<ul>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('verilog')"><li style="color:gray;">Verilog</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext">Developed using: Vivado <br/> on a Artix 7 and Kintex 7</span></span></div>
<ul>
<li>Behavioral</li> 
<li>Dataflow</li>
<li>Structural</li>
<li>System</li>
</ul>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('vhdl')"><li style="color:gray;">VHDL</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext">Developed using: Libero <br/> on a PolarFire</span></span></div>
</ul>
  
#### Simulation and Testing

<ul>

<li>Verilog Test Bench</li>
<li>Logisim</li>
<li>Waveform</li>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('IC')"><li style="color:gray;">Logic Integrated Circuits</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext"><ul style="color:white;">
<li>TTL (7400-Series)</li>
<li>CMOS</li>
</ul></span></span></div>
</ul>
  
### Internet of Things

* Communications
* Information
* Fourier Series and Transform
* Filters
* Networking

### Circuit Analysis

<ul>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('spice')"><li style="color:gray;">Spice Software</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext"><ul style="color:white;">
<li>LTSpice</li> 
<li>EasyEDA</li>
</ul></span></span></div>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('op')"><li style="color:gray;">Transistors, Diodes, and Op-Amps</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext"><ul style="color:white;">
<li>MOSFETS</li> 
<li>BJT</li>
</ul></span></span></div>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('BC')"><li style="color:gray;">Basic Circuits</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext"><p style="color:white;">Methods and Techniques:</p><ul style="color:white;">
<li>Nodal</li> 
<li>Mesh</li>
<li>Kirchhoff's Laws</li> 
<li>Thevenin's Theorem</li> 
<li>Norton's Theorem</li>
</ul></span></span></div>
<ul>
<li>Inductors</li> 
<li>Capacitors</li>
<li>Resistors</li>
</ul>
</ul>

## Data Science

### Tools

<ul>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('R')"><li>R</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext">Developed using: RStudio <br/> with Rmd files and R Scripts</span>
</span>
<div id="R" style="display:none;padding-left:20px;">

Packages include: 

+ tidyverse
  - ggplot 2 
  - dplyr
  - tidyr
  - readr
  - purr 
  - tibble
  - stringr
  - forcats
+ knitr
+ reticulate
+ lubridate
+ dygraphs
+ sf (simple features)
+ leaflet
+ devtools
+ downloader
+ pagedown
+ pacman
+ installer
+ blogdown
+ mosaic
+ car
</div></div>
  
<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('Py')"><li>Python</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext">Developed using: <br/> Google Colab <br/> with Jupyter Notebooks</span>
</span>
<div id="Py" style="display:none;padding-left:20px;">

Libraries include:

  + Pandas
  + Matplotlib
  + Numpy
  + Plotly
  + Math
  + CMath
  + Tensor Flow
  + SciPy
  + Random
</div></div>  
  
<li>Tableau</li>
<li>Databases
<ul><div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('spread')"><li style="color:gray;">Spreadsheets</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext"><ul style="color:white;">
<li>Excel</li> 
<li>Google Sheets</li>
<li>LibreOffice Calc</li>
<li>R Datasets</li>
</ul></span></span></div>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('sql')"><li style="color:gray;">SQL</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext"><ul style="color:white;">
<li>Oracle</li> 
<li>MySQL</li>
</ul></span></span></div>
</ul>

### Statistics

Tests include:

* Distributions
* Z Scores
* Confidence Interval
* t test
* Wilcox
* ANOVA
* Kruskal-Wallis
* Linear and Logistic Regression
* Chi-Squared 
  + Independence
  + Goodness of Fit
* Permutation and Randomization
    
### Data Management

* Intuition
* Insight 
* Wrangling 
* Visualization
* Exploration
* Consulting
* Mining
  
### Machine Learning

Algorithms include:

* Classifiers
* Clustering
* Decision Trees
* K-Nearest Neighbors
* Neural Networks

## Information Technology

### Web Development

<ul>

<li>HTML</li>
<li>CSS</li>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('JS')"><li style="color:gray;">JavaScript</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 21/25</span>
</span></div>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('CS')"><li style="color:gray;">C#</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 23/25</span>
</span></div>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">

<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('Rweb')"><li><i>R-based webpages</i></li></a></span>
<div id="Rweb" style="display:none;padding-left:20px;">

* Basic knitr    
  Basic building blocks:
  - knitr (R package)
  - _site.yml
  - index.Rmd
* Blogdown    
  Basic building blocks:
  - blogdown (R package)
  - config.toml
  - index.Rmd
<!-- * Bookdown     -->
<!--   Basic building blocks: -->
<!--   - bookdown (R package) -->
<!--   - config.toml -->
<!--   - index.Rmd   -->
* Pagedown    
  Basic building blocks:
  - pagedown (R package and templates)
  - knitr (R package)
  - Rmarkdown

</div></div></ul>  

### Operating Systems

* Linux
  + Ubuntu
  + Fedora
  + Crouton
  + Debian
* Chrome OS
* Microsoft Windows
  + Office 365
  + Active Directory
* Virtual Machines
  + VirtualBox
  + VMware
* Command lines 
  + Bash
  + Batch
  <!-- + Powershell -->
  + Windows Task Scheduler

### Security  

* Malware and Antimalware
* Social Engineering
* Cryptography
* Data and Networks 
* Authentication and Access
* Application and Device
* Business Continuity
* Risk Mitigation
* Binary Analysis

### Cloud Computing

* Git
  + Github
  + Bash
* Google Cloud
  + Drive
  + Colab
* Docker
* Kubernetes

## Mathematics

<ul>

<li>Differential Calculus</li>
<li>Linear Algebra</li>
<li>Boolean Algebra</li>
<li>College Algebra</li>
<li>Trigonometry</li>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('dm')"><li>Discrete Math</li></a></span>
<div id="dm" style="display:none;padding-left:20px;">

Topics include:

* Sets and Logic
* Functions and Relations
* Combinatorics and Probability
* Number Theory and Practice
* Trees and Graphs
* Languages and Grammars

</div></div>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('math')"><li style="color:gray;">Basic Math</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 25/25</span>
</span></div></ul>  

### Functional Programming
    
* MATLAB
* Mathematica
* Elisp
* Erlang

## General Programming

### Languages

<ul>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('C++')"><li>C/C++</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 25/25</span>
</span>
<div id="C++" style="display:none;padding-left:20px;">

Developed Using

* Visual Studio

</div></div>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('Java')"><li>Java</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 22/25</span>
</span>
<div id="Java" style="display:none;padding-left:20px;">

Developed Using

* IntelliJ
* Android Studio

</div></div>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('Python')"><li>Python</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext">W3 Schools Quiz: 25/25</span>
</span>
<div id="Python" style="display:none;padding-left:20px;">

Developed Using

* PyCharm 
* Thony
* Jupyter Notebook

</div></div></ul>  

### Design Patterns

* Multithreading
* UML Diagrams
* Model–view–controller
* Test Driven Development
* Observer
* Factory
* Singleton
* Adapter
* Template
* Composite

## Industry Knowledge

### Interpersonal Skills

<ul>

<li>Technical Communication</li>
<li>Human Relations</li>
<li>Problem Solving</li>
<li>Teaching</li>
<li>Leadership</li>
<li>Organization</li>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('PM')"><li>Project Management</li></a></span>
<div id="PM" style="display:none;padding-left:20px;"><ul>

<li>Technical Teamwork</li>
<li>Risk Management</li>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('method')"><li style="color:gray;">Methodologies</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext"><ul style="color:white;">
<li>Agile</li>
<li>Scrum</li>
<li>Waterfall</li>
</ul></span></span></div>

<div style="padding-left:1px;">
<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('kanban')"><li style="color:gray;">Kanban Board</li></a>
<span class="tooltipRtext"><ul style="color:white;">
<li>Trello</li>
<li>Jira</li>
</ul></span></span></div>
</ul></div></div></ul>  

### Research

* Scientific 
* Computational
* Security
* Market 
* Data
